metadata.title: Sidebar Expand on Hover
metadata.description: This Obsidian plugin expands or collapses the sidebars based on mouse hovering on the ribbons.

regex.source: Notice('Left Sidebar Expand on Hover Enabled')
regex.target: Notice('启用悬停时左侧边栏展开')

regex.source: Notice('Left Sidebar Expand on Hover disabled')
regex.target: Notice('禁用悬停时左侧边栏展开')

regex.source: Notice('Right Sidebar Expand on Hover Enabled')
regex.target: Notice('启用悬停时右侧边栏展开')

regex.source: Notice('Right Sidebar Expand on Hover disabled')
regex.target: Notice('禁用悬停时右侧边栏展开')

regex.source: .setDesc('Toggle to enable/disable left sidebar expand on hover')
regex.target: .setDesc('悬停时切换以启用/禁用左侧边栏展开')

regex.source: .setDesc('Toggle to enable/disable right sidebar expand on hover')
regex.target: .setDesc('悬停时切换以启用/禁用右侧边栏展开')

regex.source: .setDesc('Set the width of left sidebar in pixel unit')
regex.target: .setDesc('以像素为单位设置左侧边栏的宽度')

regex.source: .setDesc('Set the width of right sidebar in pixel unit')
regex.target: .setDesc('以像素为单位设置右侧边栏的宽度')
